calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Clarifying Order Determining Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Advanced From May-17-22 To Mar-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Clarifying Order Determining Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phil Foster, via Zoom, for First Republic Trust Company and Lois Horwitz, Successor Trustees.

The court and counsel discuss the order filed on Apr-01-2021 in this matter and why it should not be withdrawn or vacated, at least as to the subject real property. The court and counsel discuss why the instant petition should not be denied, as Heggstad is a streamlined procedure. Counsel reports that he believed that notice to Naline Lee was not required and offers advocacy for the filing of the instant petition. The court and counsel discuss the deed in lieu of foreclosure. Counsel mentions that decedent's retirement plan was terminated or dissolved in 1995. Counsel and the court then discuss the life estate. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel of its position and that a quiet title petition might have been a better vehicle for the relief sought. Counsel points the court to the three (3) proposed orders submitted. The court acknowledges the proposed orders and advises counsel that it will work with the proposed orders, or it may draft its own order.

The Petition for Order Clarifying Order, etc., is submitted. The Order to Show Cause is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Clarifying Order Determining Title To Real And Personal Property
